details.test: Task 1: Register July day camp with early drop-off under 350
Task 2: Choose camp theme by later daily end time under 375
Task 3: Book two sessions under a dynamic combined budget
Task 4: Buy exactly three camp merchandise items under 60 total
Task 5: Create a personal packing checklist of five items
Task 6: Register siblings and apply SIBLING10 discount
Task 7: Save a note with May financial aid deadline
Task 8: Submit peanut allergy question via contact form
Task 9: Add a high-rated affordable camp session to wishlist
Task 10: Add round-trip bus transportation to existing registration
